items.question: How much does it cost to repair an AC in Kendall?
items.answer: Common diagnostics range from $75 to $200. Most are resolved the same day. Call for a free estimate.

items.question: Do you offer emergency service?
items.answer: Yes, 24/7 service 365 days a year. There is always a technician available in Kendall.

items.question: Are the technicians licensed?
items.answer: All licensed by Florida with full liability insurance.

items.question: What areas do you cover?
items.answer: All of Kendall: The Hammocks, Kendale Lakes, Tamiami, Country Walk, Three Lakes, Richmond West.

items.quote: My AC stopped cooling on a Saturday. I called and in 45 minutes I had a technician. Incredible.
